overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along an orange-tiled sidewalk beneath an elevated highway through a futuristic urban commercial district. The scene transitions from sunlit open areas into a neon-lit covered arcade and back toward an open plaza with a large market structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with modern commercial buildings

events.description: white van passes by on the left side of the street
entering the shadow cast by the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, approaching the shadowed area ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning the entire street overhead
distinctive orange textured sidewalk tiles running the length of the path
futuristic commercial building with reflective glass facade and blue neon accent lighting
suspended array of holographic advertisements hanging from the highway structure
thick structural column supporting the elevated highway
cluster of white garbage bags piled against the building wall
green painted safety railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along an orange-tiled sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic city. The area is sunlit with vehicles passing on the left, while modern glass buildings line the right side. The camera follows a pedestrian ahead as it approaches the shadow of the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with neon signage

events.description: entering the covered commercial area under the highway with neon storefronts and darker lighting
passing under a large suspended digital billboard that temporarily blocks the sky view

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered arcade, passing by various storefronts and pedestrians in the dimmer environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning against the green railing on the right side
pedestrian in blue jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large pink neon sign for Brooklyn Pasta restaurant with bright magenta lettering
green circular neon sign indicating open business status
striped construction barricade blocking off the left side of the street
dome security camera mounted on the building corner
stack of discarded cardboard boxes on the sidewalk
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display
wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art

segments.scene_description: Moving through a covered commercial arcade beneath the highway, illuminated by neon signs including a prominent pink 'Brooklyn Pasta' restaurant sign. The environment is darker with mixed artificial lighting, featuring vending machines, graffiti-covered walls, and scattered pedestrians. Construction barricades and trash bags line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition to open plaza with market structure

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into a more open area with visible sky and palm trees
approaching the large domed market structure at the end of the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open plaza, passing a pharmacy and approaching a large market structure with increasing openness

notable_agents.action: child in gray shirt running ahead toward the plaza
pedestrian in white shirt walking past the pharmacy entrance

entered.detail: cyan neon sign reading 'Pharmacy' on the building facade
illuminated sign for auto service shop with green and red lettering
impressive large domed building with intricate metal framework at the end of the street
tall palm tree visible against the sky on the left side
red and white striped construction barriers near the pharmacy

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered arcade into a sunlit transition zone leading to an open plaza. A large domed market structure dominates the view ahead, while a pharmacy with cyan neon signage and an auto service shop line the sides. Palm trees and construction barriers are visible as the camera approaches the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban district that transitions from a sunlit street into a neon-lit underpass before emerging into an open plaza. It begins on an orange-tiled sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past passing vehicles and glass buildings as the camera follows a pedestrian into the deepening shadow of the overpass. As the camera enters the covered commercial arcade, the natural light fades into a darker environment illuminated by artificial neon signs, including a pink Brooklyn Pasta restaurant, amidst graffiti-covered walls and scattered pedestrians. The scene then shifts as the camera emerges from the arcade back into the sunlight, passing a cyan-signed pharmacy and an auto service shop. Finally, the view opens up toward a large domed market structure and palm trees as the camera approaches the destination.
